description: Welcome to Addington Gate.This 3 bedroom + Den End Unit has it all.Perfect for all ages.Spacious well cared for home has been extensively updated & feat newer vinyl floors throughout,fresh paint incl ceiling, updated kitchen with raised white European Style cabinetry & newer island,custom tile backsplash,gas range,SS Appliances,A/C, double side by side garage with custom decorative Polyaspartic floor,3 updated bathrooms incl 4 pc ensuite,vaulted ceiling,Tankless Hot Water on Demand,dramatic gas f/p,new fixtures,gas BBQ hookup,nice patio area with flowers & shrubs + much more.Prime Poco location minutes to Terry Fox Secondary,Blakeburn Lagoons Park & Elementary,Costco,West Coast Express, transportation, Nature Trails,Minnekhada Regional Park & all amenities.Don't miss this opportunity.
